species.citation: A.Wallace , Garden (London, 1871-1927) 40 (1891) 442 ; Paltiyan-Bugtong et al., Tropical Life Sciences Research 34 (2023) 217. ≠ Lilium philippinense auct. non Baker ; Napaldet, Thailand Natural History Museum Journal 11 (2017) 47.
species.distribution: Taiwan. LUZON: Benguet, Ifugao (photos), Mountain Province (photos).

species.citation: Thunb. , Trans. Linn. Soc. London, 1st Ser. 2 (1794) 333 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 204. var. longiflorum. Distribution: Japan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls. BATAN, MINDORO, Y’AMI. Notes: Low elevation, open grassy slopes. Cryptogenic.
species.distribution: Japan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Taiwan. BATAN, MINDORO, Y’AMI.
species.notes: Jessop (1979): Native country not exactly known, possibly naturalized over part of its range.

species.citation: Baker , Gard. Chron., 1st Ser. 1873 (1873) 1141 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 204; Balangcod et al., Taiwania 56 (2011) 186; Paltiyan-Bugtong et al., Tropical Life Sciences Research 34 (2023) 221.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. BATAN, LUZON: Benguet, Ilocos Norte (photos), Mountain Province, Pangasinan.
species.notes: On steep grassy slopes in the pine region. Fl. May; fr. Oct. 754-2300m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 12 June 2026

species.citation: H.G.Gut. , PJS 103 (1975) 171 ; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 197; Type: PNH 108823 (PNH, holo), Mindanao: South Cotabato.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Apayao (photos), MINDANAO: Davao del Sur (photos), Misamis Oriental (photos), South Cotabato, Sultan Kudarat (photos).
species.notes: Primary forest, along streams. Fl. Aug. 676-1014m (photos) to 1300m.
